Notes: Replace the apex NS RRset with a smaller set in one atomic UPDATE, then query the apex NS RRset to observe whether the server accepted the underspecified transition or rejected/rolled back the change.

Steps.Description: Delete the existing apex NS RRset and add back only a single NS record at the zone apex.

Steps.Name: campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe the final apex NS RRset after the UPDATE completes.
